title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 55.210 - County clerk to make monthly report to auditor (second class and certain first class counties)
text:
55.210.  County clerk to make monthly report to auditor (second class and certain first class counties). — The county clerk of each county of the first class not having a charter form of government and of each county of the second class shall file with the auditor a receipt from the collector of the revenue for all tax books by him made out and delivered to the collector.  The county clerk shall, on the last secular day of each month, file with the auditor a full and complete statement of all moneys and fees received by him by virtue of his office and of all sums by him paid out, and to whom paid, and for what purpose.
(RSMo 1939 § 13873, A.L. 1973 H.B. 678) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12210; 1919 § 9608; 1909 § 3829
